content.text: The system shall display the Projects page to allow users to view and manage warehouse projects.
I can view and manage warehouse projects
the user navigates to the Projects module
the system shall display the Projects page.

2.title: View Projects Page Title and Summary

content.text: The system shall display the page title “Projects” and supporting text indicating the total number of projects (e.g., “Manage your warehouse projects (1 total)”).
see the page title and project summary
I can understand the total number of projects
the user views the page header
the system shall display the title “Projects” with supporting text showing total project count.
The system shall provide a Search projects input field to allow users to search the project list by keyword.
I can quickly find a project
the user enters a keyword in the Search Projects field
the system shall filter the project list based on the entered keyword.
The system shall display each project as a project card in the project list.
the system shall display each project as a project card.
Each project card shall display the Project Name (e.g., “TE Warehouse 1”).
the user views a project card
the system shall display the project name.
Each project card shall display the Project ID/Code (e.g., “C9KYOI”).
I can uniquely identify the project
the user views a project card
the system shall display the project ID/code.
Each project card shall display the Project Created/Start Date with a calendar icon (e.g., “Dec 8, 2025”).
see the project start or created date
the user views a project card
the system shall display the project created/start date with a calendar icon.
Each project card shall display the Project Status badge (e.g., “Active”).
I know the current state of the project
the user views a project card
the system shall display the project status badge.
The system shall allow the user to open a project by clicking the project card.
the user clicks a project card
the system shall open the selected project.
The system shall display a top navigation with accessible entries for Dashboard and Projects, with the current module highlighted (Projects).
the user views the top navigation
the system shall display Dashboard and Projects entries with Projects highlighted as active.
The system shall provide a Sync control in the top bar to allow the user to trigger data synchronization.
the user clicks the Sync control
the system shall trigger project data synchronization.
The system shall display the logged-in user avatar/initials and user name in the top-right area.
I can confirm logged-in account details
the user views the top-right section
the system shall display the logged-in user avatar/initials and username.
When the user clicks the User avatar/name, the system shall display a user menu dropdown.
the user clicks the avatar or username
the system shall display the user menu dropdown.
The user menu dropdown shall display the username and email address.
the user menu dropdown is open
the system shall display the username and email address.
The user menu dropdown shall provide a Profile option that navigates the user to the Profile screen.
I can manage my profile details
the user menu dropdown is displayed
the user clicks the Profile option
the system shall navigate to the Profile screen.
The user menu dropdown shall provide a Settings option that navigates the user to the Settings screen.
the user menu dropdown is displayed
the user clicks the Settings option
the system shall navigate to the Settings screen.
The user menu dropdown shall provide a Log out option that logs the user out of the application and returns them to the login screen.
I can end my session safely
the user menu dropdown is displayed
the user clicks the Log out option
the system shall log the user out and redirect to the Login screen.
The system shall display the Profile screen when the user clicks the Profile option from the user menu.
I can view my account information
the user clicks the Profile option
the system shall display the Profile screen.
The system shall display the user avatar with initials derived from the user’s name to the right of the screen on the card.
I can visually identify my account
the Profile screen or user card is displayed
the user views the avatar section
the system shall display avatar initials derived from the user’s name.

20.title: View Full Name on Profile Card

content.text: The system shall allow the user to view their Full Name on the profile card to the left of the screen
view my full name on the profile card
I can verify my account information
the user views the profile card
the system shall display the user’s Full Name on the left side of the screen
The system shall display the user’s Email Address in a read-only format.
I can verify my registered email
the system shall display the Email Address in read-only format
The system shall display the user’s Designation (e.g., Admin) in a read-only format.
I can verify my role information
the system shall display the Designation in read-only format
The system shall display the user’s Account Status (e.g., Active/Inactive) on the right side user’s initials card.
I know whether my account is active or inactive
the user views the user initials card
the system shall display the Account Status on the right-side profile card
The system shall provide an Edit option for updating editable personal information fields – First name, Last name, Email address and Designation.
I can keep my profile updated
the user clicks the Edit option
the system shall allow editing of First Name, Last Name, Email Address, and Designation fields
The system shall restrict editing of User ID, and Warehouse ID.
the system shall restrict editing of User ID and Warehouse ID
The system shall save updated personal information only after user confirmation.
the user confirms the update action
the system shall save the updated personal information
The system shall display a Change Password action under the Security section with “password” title and a subtitle message- change your password to keep your account secure”
the user views the Security section
the system shall display a Change Password action with title “Password” and subtitle “Change your password to keep your account secure”
The system shall redirect the user to the password change flow when Change Password is clicked.
the Change Password action is displayed
the system shall redirect the user to the password change flow
The system shall redirect the user to the Change Password screen when the user initiates the change password action (e.g., from Profile → Security→ Change Password).
the system shall display the Change Password screen
The system shall display the Change Password screen title and helper text (“Enter and confirm your new password”).
see instructions on the Change Password screen
the Change Password screen is displayed
the user views the screen header
the system shall display the screen title and helper text “Enter and confirm your new password”
The system shall display a Current Password mandatory input field.
the system can verify my identity
the Change Password screen is displayed
the system shall display a mandatory Current Password field
The system shall display a New Password mandatory input field.
the Change Password screen is displayed
the system shall display a mandatory New Password field
The system shall display a Confirm Password mandatory input field.
the Change Password screen is displayed
the system shall display a mandatory Confirm Password field
The system shall mask characters for all password fields by default.
the system shall mask all password characters by default
The system shall provide a show/hide (eye) toggle for each password field to reveal/mask the entered value.
the user clicks the show/hide icon
the system shall reveal or mask the password value accordingly
The system shall mark Current Password, New Password, and Confirm Password as mandatory fields.
I know which fields are required
the Change Password form is displayed
the user views the form fields
the system shall mark Current Password, New Password, and Confirm Password as mandatory fields
The system shall validate the Current Password against the user’s existing password before allowing update.
the system to validate my current password
the user enters the current password
the user submits the password update request
the system shall validate the entered Current Password against the existing password
The system shall enforce the configured password rules for the New Password (e.g., minimum length/complexity rules as per system policy).
the user enters a New Password
the password does not meet configured password policy requirements
the system shall display validation and prevent submission
The system shall validate that New Password and Confirm Password match before submitting.
the system to validate that the New Password and Confirm Password fields match
I can avoid submitting mismatched passwords.
the Change Password form is displayed
the user enters values in the New Password and Confirm Password fields
the system validates that both password values match before submission.

40.title: Disable Password Submission on Validation Failure

content.text: The system shall disable password update submission when mandatory validations fail (e.g., missing fields, rules failure, mismatch).
the Change Password action disabled when validation fails
invalid password updates cannot be submitted.
the Change Password form is displayed
mandatory validations fail due to missing fields, password rule violations, or mismatched passwords
the system disables password update submission.
The system shall provide a primary action button “Change Password” to submit the password update request.
I can submit my password update request.
the Change Password form is displayed
the form footer or actions section is rendered
the system displays a primary action button labelled “Change Password”.

42.title: Update User Password After Successful Validation

content.text: The system shall update the user’s password upon successful validation and submission.
my password updated successfully after validation
I can securely use the new password for future logins.
all password validation rules pass successfully
the user submits the Change Password request
the system updates the user’s password successfully.
The system shall display a success confirmation message after the password is changed successfully- “Password changed successfully”
a success confirmation message displayed after changing my password
I know the password update was completed successfully.
the system displays a success confirmation message stating “Password changed successfully”.
The system shall prevent reusing the current password as the new password (if configured by password rules).
the system to prevent reuse of my current password
password reuse prevention rules are configured
the user enters the current password as the new password
the system prevents reuse of the current password.

45.title: Display Error for Incorrect Current Password

content.text: The system shall display an error message if the entered Current Password is incorrect.
an error message displayed when my current password is incorrect
I understand why the password update failed.
the Change Password form is displayed
the user enters an incorrect Current Password
the system displays an error message indicating that the Current Password is incorrect.

46.title: Display Error for Invalid New Password

content.text: The system shall display an error message if the New Password does not meet the password rules. (e.g., password length, special characters)
an error message displayed when the new password does not meet password rules
I can correct the password according to security requirements.
the user enters a New Password that violates password requirements
the system displays an error message indicating that the New Password does not meet the password rules.
The system shall display an error message if New Password and Confirm Password do not match.
an error message displayed when New Password and Confirm Password do not match
I can correct the mismatch before submission.
the Change Password form is displayed
the New Password and Confirm Password values do not match
the system displays an error message indicating that the passwords do not match.
The system shall provide a “Back to Login” link to navigate the user back to the login screen.
a Back to Login link displayed
I can navigate back to the login screen easily.
the system displays a “Back to Login” link.
The system shall clear/mask password inputs when the user navigates away from the page or after successful password change (as per security practice).
password fields cleared or masked when leaving the page or after successful password change
the user navigates away from the page or completes a successful password change
the system clears or masks password inputs according to security practices.

50.title: Display Logout Button on Profile Screen

content.text: The system shall provide a Logout button on the Profile screen.
a Logout button displayed on the Profile screen
I can securely end my session.
the system displays a Logout button on the Profile screen.
The system shall terminate the active session and redirect the user to the login screen upon logout.
my active session terminated and to be redirected to the login screen after logout
I can securely exit the application.
the user is logged into the application
the user clicks the Logout button
the system terminates the active session and redirects the user to the login screen.
